name: Missed work from back injury, how much pay in Salt Lake City?
description: 2/3 avg wage tax-free; report to start.

mainEntity.name: Missed work from back injury, how much pay in Salt Lake City?

acceptedAnswer.text: 2/3 avg wage tax-free; report to start.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**66 2/3% of average weekly wage, tax-free, up to state max.**

Utah TTD pays during recovery; starts after 3 days missed.[1]

- Calculate via 12-week avg.
- Max ~$1k/week (2026).
- Continues til max medical.

File claim; attorney ensures full calc.[1]
